headline: How The Quanta Services (PWR) Narrative Is Evolving With Backlog, Guidance And Valuation Shifts
summary: Quanta Services’ updated fair value estimate moves from US$479.09 to US$593.30, a shift of roughly 24% that recalibrates the price target in the latest model. This change aligns with recent Street commentary that has focused on Q4 performance, multi year earnings visibility, and the company’s participation in large scale power infrastructure projects, where many firms have also raised their targets. Read on to see how this evolving narrative might shape the way you track Quanta Services from...

headline: Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
summary: Financial services company Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 5.1% year on year to $5.2 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.09 per share was 9.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
content.summary: Financial services company Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 5.1% year on year to $5.2 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.09 per share was 9.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Truist (TFC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: One example of this is our project finance business, which is a client-focused platform that provides financial advice and capital to help develop essential infrastructure that drives long-term economic growth, job creation and stronger and better communities throughout our footprint in the United States.  This is driving higher quality fee growth with an increase in the number of lead roles and meaningful contributions from existing commercial and wealth clients.

content.title: Truist (TFC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
